productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Printed Maroon Ties
description: This tie from Reid and Taylor in a deep burgundy brown jacquard weave with a repeat pattern of small flowers is a perfect match for slim Fit dress shirts - from classic white to black and beige.Length: 150 cmMade of 100% silk for luxurious feel and light sheenHas a design made of diagonal bands in varying widths and in different shades of greens and browns with highlights of champagne goldOne loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in placeTie careDry clean only This tie from Reid and Taylor in a deep burgundy brown jacquard weave with a repeat pattern of small flowers is a perfect match for slim fit dress shirts - from classic white to black and beige.Length: 150 cmMade of 100% silk for luxurious feel and light sheenHas a design made of diagonal bands in varying widths and in different shades of greens and browns with highlights of champagne goldOne loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in placeTie careDry clean only
